@let traveler = account?.profile?.displayName ?? 'Guest'; @let city = account?.profile?.city ?? '東京'; @let welcome = `Welcome, ${traveler} — café in ${city} 🚀 𝌆`; @let todayLabel = now | date:'fullDate':timeZone:locale;

Account overview

{{ welcome }}

{{ todayLabel }}

@let primaryLinks = navigation | slice:0:4; @let activePath = router?.url ?? '/overview'; @let hasOverflow = navigation.length > primaryLinks.length; Overview Orders Billing {{ activePath }} {{ hasOverflow ? 'More available' : 'All shown' }}
@let profile = account?.profile; @let fullName = profile?.fullName ?? traveler; @let initials = abbreviate(fullName, 2); @let contact = profile?.email || profile?.phone || 'No contact on file'; @let locationParts = [profile?.city, profile?.region, profile?.country]; @let location = locationParts | compact | join:', '; @let verified = account?.verified === true;

Profile

{{ initials }}

{{ fullName }}

{{ contact }}

{{ location }}

{{ verified ? 'Verified' : 'Verification needed' }}

@let currencyCode = account?.billing?.currency ?? 'EUR'; @let available = balances.available ?? 0; @let pending = balances.pending ?? 0; @let reserved = balances.reserved ?? 0; @let totalBalance = available + pending + reserved; @let formattedBalance = totalBalance | currency:currencyCode:'symbol':'1.2-2'; @let balanceTone = totalBalance < 0 ? 'danger' : (pending > 0 ? 'pending' : 'stable');

Balance

{{ formattedBalance }}

Available, pending, and reserved funds

@let visibleOrders = orders | slice:pageStart:pageEnd; @let orderCount = orders?.length ?? 0; @let firstOrder = visibleOrders[0]; @let lastOrder = visibleOrders[visibleOrders.length - 1]; @let orderRange = orderCount === 0 ? 'No orders' : `Orders ${firstOrder?.number ?? '—'} to ${lastOrder?.number ?? '—'}`; @let canPageBack = pageStart > 0 && !ordersLoading; @let canPageForward = pageEnd < orderCount && !ordersLoading;

Recent orders

{{ orderRange }}

@let preferredAddress = account?.shippingAddress ?? account?.billingAddress; @let destination = formatAddress( preferredAddress, locale, [preferredAddress?.city, preferredAddress?.country] ); @let coordinates = preferredAddress?.coordinates as [number, number]; @let deliveryWindow = estimateDelivery( cart.items, preferredAddress?.postalCode, expedited ? 'express' : 'standard' ); @let deliveryMessage = `Delivery to ${destination}: ${deliveryWindow | date:'mediumDate'}`;

Delivery

{{ destination }}

{{ deliveryMessage }}

{{ coordinates }}
@let itemCount = cart.items.length; @let subtotal = calculateSubtotal(cart.items); @let discount = cart.coupon?.amount ?? 0; @let taxable = subtotal - discount; @let tax = calculateTax( taxable, account?.taxRegion ?? 'default', cart.items ); @let shipping = itemCount > 0 ? quoteShipping(cart.items, preferredAddress) : 0; @let grandTotal = subtotal - discount + tax + shipping; @let grandTotalLabel = grandTotal | currency:currencyCode:'symbol':'1.2-2'; @let checkoutLabel = itemCount === 1 ? 'Checkout one item' : `Checkout ${itemCount} items`;

Cart

{{ itemCount }} items

{{ grandTotalLabel }}

@let colorScheme = preferences?.theme ?? systemTheme ?? 'light'; @let compactMode = preferences?.density === 'compact'; @let motionAllowed = !preferences?.reduceMotion; @let languageName = languageNames[locale] ?? locale; @let preferenceSummary = [ colorScheme, compactMode ? 'compact' : 'comfortable', motionAllowed ? 'motion' : 'reduced motion', languageName, ] | join:' · ';

Preferences

{{ preferenceSummary }}

Unicode sample: café · 東京 · 𝌆 · 🚀

@let lastLogin = sessions[0]?.startedAt; @let trustedDeviceCount = devices | trusted | count; @let hasRecoveryCodes = recoveryCodes?.length > 0; @let securityScore = scoreSecurity( account?.mfaEnabled, trustedDeviceCount, hasRecoveryCodes, lastLogin ); @let securityLevel = securityScore >= 80 ? 'strong' : (securityScore >= 50 ? 'fair' : 'weak');

Security

Last login: {{ lastLogin | date:'medium' }}

Trusted devices: {{ trustedDeviceCount }}

{{ securityLevel }}

@let openTickets = tickets | status:'open'; @let oldestTicket = openTickets[0]; @let supportName = assignedAgent?.name ?? 'Support team'; @let ticketSummary = openTickets.length ? `${openTickets.length} open — oldest is ${oldestTicket?.subject ?? 'untitled'}` : 'No open support requests'; @let supportAction = openTickets.length > 0 ? 'View requests' : 'Start a request';

Support

{{ ticketSummary }}

Your contact: {{ supportName }}

@let buildLabel = `Web ${build.version} (${build.commit | slice:0:8})`; @let legalYear = now | date:'yyyy'; @let footerLabel = formatFooter(legalYear, companyName, buildLabel); {{ footerLabel }}
